ablations.interpretation: Without the ConfirmationCard layer, 0/72 HARD_WRITE tools would have executed a direct write under audit conditions; the remaining 72 would have been stopped by lower-level argument validation, not by an architectural safety mechanism.

With domain routing ablated (all queries forced to the general agent), 8/10 of T01-T10 satisfy the strict-pass criterion under seed 1. Compare with the post-improvement five-seed baseline of 47/50 (94%) in Section 4.1.2.
